name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: My committees in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, I’m pleased to report to you that I’ve been appointed to two committees in the U.S. House of Representatives—the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee and the Foreign Affairs Committee.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNEbWVzc2FnZSUyNnV0bV9jb250ZW50JTNEZW1haWwlMkJsb2dvJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNETXklMkJDb21taXR0ZWVzJTJCSW4lMkJDb25ncmVzcyUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=442A629A1A8668)

| | |
---
| | Friends-

I’m pleased to report to you that I’ve been appointed to two committees in the U.S. House of Representatives—the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee and the Foreign Affairs Committee.

Transportation and Infrastructure is a highly sought after appointment that is responsible for overseeing all modes of transportation, including airlines, mass transportation and roads and bridges. It also has jurisdiction over other aspects of our nation’s infrastructure, such as water and sewer systems, pipelines and even federal buildings. I’m also proud to have been appointed to the Transportation Committee’s Subcommittees on Coast Guard and Maritime Transportation and Highways and Transit.

The Foreign Affairs Committee is responsible for overseeing national security and foreign policy, treaties, military deployments and international economic policy.

These two committee assignments will give me an opportunity to weigh in on issues that are important to our district and the people who live here.

Given the transportation needs of our district and our city, the Transportation and Infrastructure was my first choice. It will allow me to fight for the resources needed to upgrade our city’s aging infrastructure and mass transit systems and hold both the MTA and Port Authority accountable. The Foreign Affairs Committee will help ensure we have a voice on the international stage.

Finally, House Republican Whip Steve Scalise asked me to be part of his leadership team as an Assistant Whip.

These appointments are great news for our district and I will keep you informed about the important priorities we’re working on.

Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

---
| | |

clean_body: It's going to be a tough battle. The future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we win because this seat -- a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED -- is a top-target. ** . == My accent is part of my story. I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill. Friend, it was then I realized the Left 's socialist agenda wasn't making things better -- it was actually making it worse. == Since then, I have returned over $400 million to taxpayers, opposed any tax increases, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. I will always protect taxpayers, == == The Democrats spent $11,000,000.00 against and outspent us 3:1. One week after Election Day, we defeated Pelosi's handpicked candidate by just a couple thousand votes and flipped a California seat from BLUE to RED. And now, our Far Left opponent -- the very one we defeated only weeks ago -- is gunning for a rematch.** == It's going to be a tough battle. The future of the House Majority hinges on whether or not we win because this seat -- a seat we just recently flipped from BLUE to RED \-- is a top-target. The Democrats have already spent millions against us, and they're prepared to spend millions more to buy this seat out from under us. == == Once again, we're facing one of the toughest, closest races in the nation, but with the support of grassroots conservatives like you, I know we can win again. Thank you, Michelle Steel | With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
As the global beacon for democracy and freedom, our country must stand resolute in our unshaking belief in the Constitution

Friend,
**As the global beacon for democracy and freedom, our country must stand resolute in our unshaking belief in the Constitution.** When our democracy is threatened, it is the duty of our elected officials to uphold the oath we swore to defend this nation and maintain our fidelity to the Constitution.
[Stand with Liz to DEFEAT the Dems](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5QnSZ7HdLo-PB5jEHic8R3zqRYK41RpzQZOSYonr_gH4C2UKtqwjaBNbLtnCmkroSnGGUZ0O5NRxztq3WWqyj2xMXUTSyhA9llZlR5gNrQoBPnoTbBEB1E0sPGvGyj8DKYqBNSkPT8Dvrzqmv1w9Yo_oVHcaIMqQFnf4j93PQ0PoH_SIsv0P2vetDIyHHar9FxkQjrVdEMsjUQIK0uyneBuX5K1BURyHWdXWm9vzhbd2a5U6h0NKKuuC38Knl2XIprTy7t1XgoU_aBIJmWlXOWocb8sLdFofXK0Ikqw0rG3LITPBROCpYZhP9n_5MFmaSDnRo9uFz6wiyiBNPRmlvBJ-25YmCc1QQPtx302YnRvPP82W1P-QZMXCFKN20jJ5UvsOFHRs0_60-SIy--FIM0K5TGWhDlu2vtp5IEjW8zHPHECKlcxIw==&c=W4HwfGdPP3sbAJ-XmocX2NIcK-abe2oDKf6srfJxX_OQM7GkvjkQwA==&ch=DttX9ZkB9qM5izkMHMgXl7Zk64FuEzk3Svg0jWJZpq5mPx1kwsU0NQ==)
**Now is the time for us to work together to defend democracy and fight for conservative values that we know will lead our country to prosperity.** ****
**With Republican leaders standing together and unified, we will defeat the Democrats and protect the ideals that we cherish.** ****
[Stand with Liz to DEFEAT the Dems](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5QnSZ7HdLo-PB5jEHic8R3zqRYK41RpzQZOSYonr_gH4C2UKtqwjaBNbLtnCmkroSnGGUZ0O5NRxztq3WWqyj2xMXUTSyhA9llZlR5gNrQoBPnoTbBEB1E0sPGvGyj8DKYqBNSkPT8Dvrzqmv1w9Yo_oVHcaIMqQFnf4j93PQ0PoH_SIsv0P2vetDIyHHar9FxkQjrVdEMsjUQIK0uyneBuX5K1BURyHWdXWm9vzhbd2a5U6h0NKKuuC38Knl2XIprTy7t1XgoU_aBIJmWlXOWocb8sLdFofXK0Ikqw0rG3LITPBROCpYZhP9n_5MFmaSDnRo9uFz6wiyiBNPRmlvBJ-25YmCc1QQPtx302YnRvPP82W1P-QZMXCFKN20jJ5UvsOFHRs0_60-SIy--FIM0K5TGWhDlu2vtp5IEjW8zHPHECKlcxIw==&c=W4HwfGdPP3sbAJ-XmocX2NIcK-abe2oDKf6srfJxX_OQM7GkvjkQwA==&ch=DttX9ZkB9qM5izkMHMgXl7Zk64FuEzk3Svg0jWJZpq5mPx1kwsU0NQ==)

We are facing some of the greatest challenges our nation has ever known. Now is the time to stand strong in the face of threats from our foreign adversaries and fight to defend our founding principles from Democrats' assault.
**
With Pelosi and the Democrats pursuing dangerous policies, it is more important than ever we take back the House in 2022. **

Now is the time to elect more GOP leaders who will stand strong in their convictions and uphold the Constitution.**Will you help the GOP take back the House and protect the future of our nation?**

[Stand with Liz to DEFEAT the Dems](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U5QnSZ7HdLo-PB5jEHic8R3zqRYK41RpzQZOSYonr_gH4C2UKtqwjaBNbLtnCmkroSnGGUZ0O5NRxztq3WWqyj2xMXUTSyhA9llZlR5gNrQoBPnoTbBEB1E0sPGvGyj8DKYqBNSkPT8Dvrzqmv1w9Yo_oVHcaIMqQFnf4j93PQ0PoH_SIsv0P2vetDIyHHar9FxkQjrVdEMsjUQIK0uyneBuX5K1BURyHWdXWm9vzhbd2a5U6h0NKKuuC38Knl2XIprTy7t1XgoU_aBIJmWlXOWocb8sLdFofXK0Ikqw0rG3LITPBROCpYZhP9n_5MFmaSDnRo9uFz6wiyiBNPRmlvBJ-25YmCc1QQPtx302YnRvPP82W1P-QZMXCFKN20jJ5UvsOFHRs0_60-SIy--FIM0K5TGWhDlu2vtp5IEjW8zHPHECKlcxIw==&c=W4HwfGdPP3sbAJ-XmocX2NIcK-abe2oDKf6srfJxX_OQM7GkvjkQwA==&ch=DttX9ZkB9qM5izkMHMgXl7Zk64FuEzk3Svg0jWJZpq5mPx1kwsU0NQ==)

name: Tim Scott's iPhone
subject: re: $15 Friday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Hey Friend,

Wanted to drop a quick note to personally ask you to [**join my $15 Friday team.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/15-fri-team/?utm_campaign=20210205_TY.100609_tim-scotts-iphone_t1047199-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210205_re-15-friday/)

[**Just $15 or any amount you can afford will go a long way in helping us take back the Senate.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/15-fri-team/?utm_campaign=20210205_TY.100609_tim-scotts-iphone_t1047199-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210205_re-15-friday/)

I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much [**if you could dig deep and chip in just $15.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/15-fri-team/?utm_campaign=20210205_TY.100609_tim-scotts-iphone_t1047199-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210205_re-15-friday/)

I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

I understand the value of every dollar.

Friend, I don't take asking for money lightly and I am grateful for every donation, every prayer, and every action you have taken to help win back the Senate Majority.

Friend, I don't take asking for money lightly and I am grateful for every donation, every prayer, and every action you have taken to help win back the Senate Majority. name: Young Kim
subject: I am living the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I came to this country as a young girl. My mother and I would collect cans and bottles on the beach and then donate the funds raised to our church -- our way of giving back to the community that had welcomed us with open arms.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsIwSgBKm2743M5QehybUryZ9Ralcv8d0687M8IZG5sZmKQztlPnH1zzMM4sD0UT7o-dMQorCTT0bisr-3BubtwjPkrAz045BNUm_BKyuueUWrkeGSPI1gkm8-VLlIvjqy2DCKylgn1F1PspuKIg1omJlVG0tlf9SRKnMqxHdvUk97P7O5RfxLQ40d4XDvoukkXMEWl_fkpGR8Ot3C0ix4wSFmWpyHf4e2r164g1FmHpwv_yZ9nMnjxWbJfDoeAJgnUg2oPCKp7Ie4niChLXTVCVAVvvHG99uHOFW0aFdrmxjewKUgAEhNBDmayIee-TktrSohhRC8BEnufTapjj9pd443pDXyW2VJX_ShYeu4E9g492mGXkt7dg3gxcJvwjQQDIG2yzr3Ob1mlGYdZz8OJ4qTaM8wOOeLb4WBDYox7q9Y1wLgGbDw==&c=K1YJMQU2qm4kG6ie78IZwqYiJ5ZAQrw0yYjnNCXGxX4vbvRr4rnbVA==&ch=yQAT5vetYLvZw61g4Hth00_-GtBP4v8IPNqhYdSn-suEV6Qhv6opVw==)

I am living the American Dream.

Friend, I came to this country as a young girl. My mother and I would collect cans and bottles on the beach and then donate the funds raised to our church -- our way of giving back to the community that had welcomed us with open arms.

I spent years navigating our immigration process and was granted citizenship. I put myself through college, started a business, raised a family, and now am one of the first Korean American women in Congress. I have always put our community first, and will continue to do so in Washington.

[**But, Friend, I need your help to keep the American Dream alive for future generations -- to ensure that everyone has the same opportunity I did all those years ago. I can 't do it alone.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsIwSgBKm2743M5QehybUryZ9Ralcv8d0687M8IZG5sZmKQztlPnH5MkJ34ZyfFlTx2jK1Lr4_f1NXn8dtR1idhDQ2WviJyo1ssBex2q01w4lRBKIJRvSsRy7SrF9nSFkDesIP6RaJwdaZJMT9BLUyF46cwMheCjqiCTPHfkS0r7YjJrc2cZfpQA4C2uOWH1nHnrHbGE4KEd_TK_4t25YCxMNYt6gERJejy9kTqQsA2Ap33OvV3pIZM_m-TcSAjZj7agar0RsK58zM3w34z-84e5UAVWkvxzqRg0EtbmNnfEw8wqu73zf-kllNp7WRSCOAtF73Hd569v6u0DEJX9K0BtG5J3NVBmfx6FjAKDdQHZqFEGllNZy2udmHJj5F5CjXWNwKhBsleVchzHJ4Z6lpsLYNOzVuRNxZoOSyxmJbguMluz9oY_sQ==&c=K1YJMQU2qm4kG6ie78IZwqYiJ5ZAQrw0yYjnNCXGxX4vbvRr4rnbVA==&ch=yQAT5vetYLvZw61g4Hth00_-GtBP4v8IPNqhYdSn-suEV6Qhv6opVw==)

We only recently unseated Pelosi's candidate -- the first Republican to unseat an incumbent CA Democrat in 26 years -- and we're not in the clear. The Democrat's spent $20+ million against us, outspending us at every turn, and this time around we'll face millions more. Pelosi is determined to win back every seat she lost, _including this one._

[**Can you chip in to defend this seat?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JsIwSgBKm2743M5QehybUryZ9Ralcv8d0687M8IZG5sZmKQztlPnH5MkJ34ZyfFlTx2jK1Lr4_f1NXn8dtR1idhDQ2WviJyo1ssBex2q01w4lRBKIJRvSsRy7SrF9nSFkDesIP6RaJwdaZJMT9BLUyF46cwMheCjqiCTPHfkS0r7YjJrc2cZfpQA4C2uOWH1nHnrHbGE4KEd_TK_4t25YCxMNYt6gERJejy9kTqQsA2Ap33OvV3pIZM_m-TcSAjZj7agar0RsK58zM3w34z-84e5UAVWkvxzqRg0EtbmNnfEw8wqu73zf-kllNp7WRSCOAtF73Hd569v6u0DEJX9K0BtG5J3NVBmfx6FjAKDdQHZqFEGllNZy2udmHJj5F5CjXWNwKhBsleVchzHJ4Z6lpsLYNOzVuRNxZoOSyxmJbguMluz9oY_sQ==&c=K1YJMQU2qm4kG6ie78IZwqYiJ5ZAQrw0yYjnNCXGxX4vbvRr4rnbVA==&ch=yQAT5vetYLvZw61g4Hth00_-GtBP4v8IPNqhYdSn-suEV6Qhv6opVw==) If you've ever wanted to have a direct and immediate impact on the future of our nation. You can't afford to sit this one out.

Pelosi has the House. Schumer has the Senate. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have the White House. Winning back the House for Republicans is the only way to put lower taxes, affordable healthcare, small business protection, and quick, common-sense reforms at the top of the agenda!

Friend, this is bigger than one seat. It's about saving the future of our nation. Can I count on you to help to defend this seat from the Democrats?

To victory,

Young Kim

subject: The power of the pen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
Joe Biden promised to bring this country together, yet he has done everything he can to go around Congress and rule with the pen. He has signed more Executive Orders in his first few weeks in office than any other President before him.

Joe Biden promised to bring this country together, yet he has done everything he can to go around Congress and rule with the pen. He has signed more Executive Orders in his first few weeks in office than any other President before him. On day one, President Biden chose to kill over 11,000 American energy jobs during an economic crisis.

Will you chip in to our efforts today to show Joe Biden that he does not have a mandate to rule by Executive Order? If we don't step up right now and show this administration that the American people won't stand for Biden's partisan agenda, we may face this for the next four years.

name: Team Stanton
subject: It’s time to raise the minimum wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
It’s been over ten years since the Federal minimum wage was raised, and on top of everything else happening in the world, no American should have to worry about putting food on their table if they’re working 40 hours per week. A greater number of American adults are working in retail and service industry positions that rely on the minimum wage. With many corporations reporting record profits, American workers must receive a liveable wage to support themselves and their families.

Will you join us and sign on to the petition calling on Congress to raise the Federal minimum wage?

Thank you for your support!

In solidarity,
-- Team Stanton

------------------------------------------

Omar has exhibited conduct that is COMPLETELY unbecoming of a member of Congress. She practically endorsed the violence that Antifa committed during the BLM riots this last summer, and she 's made MULTIPLE racist comments and statements during her time in Congress. America doesn't need leaders that are trying to destroy the country, we need leaders that will stand up for our nation and defend our people. There's no doubt that the Radical Left will be targeting me for standing up against far-left Ilhan Omar -- and that's why I need your support. == == Ilhan Omar's defense of Antifa and the violence of the BLM riots is TERRIFYING. Just last year, my wife and I were ASSAULTED by Antifa members during a riot in D.C. This kind of behavior is SICK and should not be endorsed by a member of Congress. == Thank you, Ronny Jackson Congressman (TX-13) == | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson PO BOX 53058 AMARILLO, TX 79159 == | | Texans for Ronny Jackson | PO BOX 53058, Amarillo, TX 73159 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: Can I ask you something, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
In a minute, I'm going to ask for your endorsement. But before I do that, I want to make sure you have all the information on who I am and why I'm running for Congress.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zFAPWu848EqD4FXQWE9xP1GYpTyJIOBKk3sgBX7s4EC__zOfqhDFKO6_4_ICY5ZTo5h7ES_sqxDLPUwoxCiiwLgxqGHFhHFghhmHvmW44v8HPe0TsFaq2MXSN283iRDznVBxvOw-Au2o8L01FQEqgq3jvmsGKsfE1MFi0za97NhjiBFgjw6gesm2kGOw4Y55biW5XL8EVPCLGFY3WaKRi7R7B2vMs2c86Qw587I3ezP6Ga9KlrXSCKgrqw6V3ZQLk1mupvaVhu-MZigLMvrNeOm1nUNS08Qkmu_7NPU-Iqx4vLq3p7DQYXgz0kM5nrzX5XvLYXlFmpexb9n47diDCBAaIqJbPP7P7hEnJoWzavHVSBZ2PoXQaNPloyfEo_6FEhjUjNIibOSOsgyEapELA==&c=AurobNkAREMOzlxkI8Qt8_KLyoteGN3qI_o5MXjCo5xwl5IWP34Z3w==&ch=-3u9l0OjZxro4dRG2W6JGwe6qp6NCsP7lz-aVfF7rTVvwMkz4fUJSQ==)
[**Friend, in a minute, I 'm going to ask for your endorsement.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zFAPWu848EqD4FXQWE9xP1GYpTyJIOBKk3sgBX7s4EC__zOfqhDFKO6_4_ICY5ZTo5h7ES_sqxDLPUwoxCiiwLgxqGHFhHFghhmHvmW44v8HPe0TsFaq2MXSN283iRDznVBxvOw-Au2o8L01FQEqgq3jvmsGKsfE1MFi0za97NhjiBFgjw6gesm2kGOw4Y55biW5XL8EVPCLGFY3WaKRi7R7B2vMs2c86Qw587I3ezP6Ga9KlrXSCKgrqw6V3ZQLk1mupvaVhu-MZigLMvrNeOm1nUNS08Qkmu_7NPU-Iqx4vLq3p7DQYXgz0kM5nrzX5XvLYXlFmpexb9n47diDCBAaIqJbPP7P7hEnJoWzavHVSBZ2PoXQaNPloyfEo_6FEhjUjNIibOSOsgyEapELA==&c=AurobNkAREMOzlxkI8Qt8_KLyoteGN3qI_o5MXjCo5xwl5IWP34Z3w==&ch=-3u9l0OjZxro4dRG2W6JGwe6qp6NCsP7lz-aVfF7rTVvwMkz4fUJSQ==) But before I do that, I want to make sure you have all the information on who I am and why I'm doing what I'm doing.

I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman searching for opportunity. Instead, I discovered a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. No matter how well-intentioned, the government was failing those who needed it most.

I ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very government agency that had taken advantage of my single mother's small business -- and won. Since then, I've returned $400+ million to taxpayers and provided quick, common-sense reforms that help hardworking Americans and small businesses thrive.

We faced an uphill battle. The media called it the "marquee fight to watch." POLITICO called it a toss-up seat. Cook Political rated it a "Lean D." Fivethirtyeight gave us a 68/100 chance of losing. Even worse, we were outspent 3:1 and the Democrats spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation. But despite the odds, we won.

_Our victory was in no small part because of our tremendous grassroots team._

I'm humbled to be the first woman elected to represent CA-48 and one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. But our work isn't done yet. I will continue to fight for taxpayers and small businesses, and always put hardworking Americans first. But I can't, without your support.

That's why today, I'm emailing you to ask for your endorsement, Friend. [**Can I count on you to join thousands of conservative patriots and add your name to our ever-growing list of grassroots endorsements?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zFAPWu848EqD4FXQWE9xP1GYpTyJIOBKk3sgBX7s4EC__zOfqhDFKO6_4_ICY5ZTo5h7ES_sqxDLPUwoxCiiwLgxqGHFhHFghhmHvmW44v8HPe0TsFaq2MXSN283iRDznVBxvOw-Au2o8L01FQEqgq3jvmsGKsfE1MFi0za97NhjiBFgjw6gesm2kGOw4Y55biW5XL8EVPCLGFY3WaKRi7R7B2vMs2c86Qw587I3ezP6Ga9KlrXSCKgrqw6V3ZQLk1mupvaVhu-MZigLMvrNeOm1nUNS08Qkmu_7NPU-Iqx4vLq3p7DQYXgz0kM5nrzX5XvLYXlFmpexb9n47diDCBAaIqJbPP7P7hEnJoWzavHVSBZ2PoXQaNPloyfEo_6FEhjUjNIibOSOsgyEapELA==&c=AurobNkAREMOzlxkI8Qt8_KLyoteGN3qI_o5MXjCo5xwl5IWP34Z3w==&ch=-3u9l0OjZxro4dRG2W6JGwe6qp6NCsP7lz-aVfF7rTVvwMkz4fUJSQ==)

Our opponent has already declared a rematch and is already funneling cash into his campaign war chest. The Democrats spent $11 million to defeat us and are prepared to spend millions more to flip this seat back blue. In fact, last week -- just weeks into my first term -- the Democrats launched a television ad campaign against us.

They're campaigning against us with everything they got and will fight tooth and nail for the next two years to defeat us. Because they know, just as well as we do, that this seat will determine who controls the House Majority. We need to build a grassroots team to defend this seat because California's 48th District -- and hardworking Americans across the nation -- deserve better.

[**So, Friend, are you with me?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zFAPWu848EqD4FXQWE9xP1GYpTyJIOBKk3sgBX7s4EC__zOfqhDFKO6_4_ICY5ZTo5h7ES_sqxDLPUwoxCiiwLgxqGHFhHFghhmHvmW44v8HPe0TsFaq2MXSN283iRDznVBxvOw-Au2o8L01FQEqgq3jvmsGKsfE1MFi0za97NhjiBFgjw6gesm2kGOw4Y55biW5XL8EVPCLGFY3WaKRi7R7B2vMs2c86Qw587I3ezP6Ga9KlrXSCKgrqw6V3ZQLk1mupvaVhu-MZigLMvrNeOm1nUNS08Qkmu_7NPU-Iqx4vLq3p7DQYXgz0kM5nrzX5XvLYXlFmpexb9n47diDCBAaIqJbPP7P7hEnJoWzavHVSBZ2PoXQaNPloyfEo_6FEhjUjNIibOSOsgyEapELA==&c=AurobNkAREMOzlxkI8Qt8_KLyoteGN3qI_o5MXjCo5xwl5IWP34Z3w==&ch=-3u9l0OjZxro4dRG2W6JGwe6qp6NCsP7lz-aVfF7rTVvwMkz4fUJSQ==)

clean_body: In a minute, I'm going to ask for your endorsement. But before I do that, I want to make sure you have all the information on who I am and why I'm running for Congress. ** . == == But before I do that, I want to make sure you have all the information on who I am and why I'm doing what I'm doing. I was born in Korea, raised in Japan, and came to America as a young woman searching for opportunity. Instead, I discovered a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. No matter how well-intentioned, the government was failing those who needed it most. I ran for the California State Board of Equalization -- the very government agency that had taken advantage of my single mother's small business -- and won. Since then, I've returned $400+ million to taxpayers and provided quick, common-sense reforms that help hardworking Americans and small businesses thrive. We faced an uphill battle. The media called it the "marquee fight to watch." POLITICO called it a toss-up seat. Cook Political rated it a "Lean D." Fivethirtyeight gave us a 68/100 chance of losing. Even worse, we were outspent 3:1 and the Democrats spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation. But despite the odds, we won. Our victory was in no small part because of our tremendous grassroots team. I'm humbled to be the first woman elected to represent CA-48 and one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. But our work isn't done yet. I will continue to fight for taxpayers and small businesses, and always put hardworking Americans first. But I can't, without your support. That's why today, I'm emailing you to ask for your endorsement, Friend. == == | == Our opponent has already declared a rematch and is already funneling cash into his campaign war chest. The Democrats spent $11 million to defeat us and are prepared to spend millions more to flip this seat back blue. In fact, last week -- just weeks into my first term -- the Democrats launched a television ad campaign against us. They're campaigning against us with everything they got and will fight tooth and nail for the next two years to defeat us. Because they know, just as well as we do, that this seat will determine who controls the House Majority. We need to build a grassroots team to defend this seat because California's 48th District -- and hardworking Americans across the nation -- deserve better. == Thank you for your support, Michelle Steel == ==** == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Big Tech looks like Big Brother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
The tech platforms promised you they'd be a place where you could freely express your views. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=db3588400a2e4ba28a23db88026cc2ee&_e=ju_KXP07wUDRs81VZmjQvwBLUULiZ6aDyKSxJJTkT1bFPeBI33iuBAn0z7Su_ct9FlgyH0tLrsMLy14eGisIHuxYpLOhiJU3eRDmewWFrMN29rH2nUydSx0yqYyR1eg8KQmpN4HD6nYLIfGuOC_D6jRaoyplXGu8sN83qwYYdH5Zxca-F_7aegqkIhNwdx3NxdpTI899pqLPZb3jnEN3T3VgWhwmhURaPjeBI4SoBH0WI8gDT-awvnlA2iFqj3yyKnN8Au1itn0D-CN2fl0MyEAqsNXXm13nMYC2hrpzXUVLaS2elJMvbyStPLEhnAoU1BJBo29fiDXSBxXzSV7pTxzn_6mxFWhaY27APf1S4iA%3D) | |
---
Peter,
The tech platforms promised you they’d be a place where you could freely express your views.

You thought they were an escape from the bias of the mainstream media.

You signed up for an account. You followed all the rules. _**And then they stole your data and started censoring conservatives.**_ _**Maybe they’ve censored you.**_

Like so many big corporations in league with the left, who tell you nice stories about how they put power into the hands of the people, these social platforms really only care about two things: money and power.

**They’ve addicted to America to their products so that they can control us.**
[**_Fight Back! -_ Defend our First Amendment Right to Free Speech NOW! _> >>_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=db3588400a2e4ba28a23db88026cc2ee&_e=ju_KXP07wUDRs81VZmjQv993zzegsJq6IhhbDn9h4Wp7s8UvCYHKZbuA36zrtpbWj0DlWTCh1Q8dn8OLDbqnbqMLTu-T97t-C9tgMRpdXg5h5jHrQE1cZUpmEJGCw4p0sbK2SW5LeVRkq2duko1czIUefJqrefY3ipUxIczrAqfsPAQrwyCQobsfPEHROKK7MDIBqt4qFcIfChULOH8wR1e9NHTh694PFwibgu0Rr8PEL9OXuobwu5tHwItbXlftR6f00WSPhCrcKTkPujmyyNAru1EPFVDiuQZh9wqHWuljcymX2k-HZup7NSGZVwLmKLi6XWnguvMQaekjS7ocn6LjmMBzddlSz35n_PiJnp4Q8clXh6ZuB6BwRYNLy8J2ZwLgwqwTypwcv78PXjoy7qWFZeV8knegJGzgyWYoWMY%3D)
This is a threat to democratic self-government. Remember the Hunter Biden story? When the New York Post reported on an explosive scandal - one that could have lost Biden the election - Big Tech shut it down. They went into overdrive to block users from sharing news of the Biden's corruption.

_**And now they tell you you have no right to complain that this election wasn’t fair. **_

**This blatant disregard for free speech, the open exchange of ideas, and democracy itself should terrify all of us.**

Big Tech’s crackdown on conservatives will only get worse unless Republicans stand up to their power. We must stand up to Big Tech's shutdown of American free speech **NOW** , before it's too late.
[_**Join me**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=db3588400a2e4ba28a23db88026cc2ee&_e=ju_KXP07wUDRs81VZmjQv993zzegsJq6IhhbDn9h4Wp7s8UvCYHKZbuA36zrtpbWj0DlWTCh1Q8dn8OLDbqnbqMLTu-T97t-C9tgMRpdXg5h5jHrQE1cZUpmEJGCw4p0sbK2SW5LeVRkq2duko1czIUefJqrefY3ipUxIczrAqfsPAQrwyCQobsfPEHROKK7MDIBqt4qFcIfChULOH8wR6Tz7pnstL0Cuq0nuts_Izq7ehOseufxvcRhRoxSMvTbCK9vmIVeotMc4N1Y3VaRFgjE9flzSo8I8oRAm0PKsVuW0eFxKj2d00TYcnaMYPjt226wgji3dTvHaU1-N3CH6Ag-I2EYXM4Kj54p6zPl18CtrgCof45zUnzlotPx49Khgl86tWkyLxj6k3xCZcQPhGxHI0f4vmM2kp63mygSIco%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001el27RZGrah_9lSzqbaEkSZb5fRGK7zgwm7J-JN36l_PAFv_3IfpiULshoCKnh1FTvOa2BgsfP50K737AkeMCpuKORZcH_cXDHpS9Sw62Fca3laMbvxkulTFFpEJUBNKmNW9jfVeAd94=&c=_blbBQoYIrUTHQuyG1NC7Pm9Jy38I305TNpqMKDbFv6azgrE0jeGWw==&ch=S8J8HdS_ISwiNFAIz_rpalwqKAweSHdHK2gWlJblBluCFCE4v5iQ7Q==).

clean_body: Right in our backyard, immigration officials are preparing for thousands of migrants traveling from Central America towards the U.S. border. == == == Friend, Right in our backyard, immigration officials are preparing for thousands of migrants traveling from Central America towards the U.S. border. Tony's top priority has always been reforming border security and immigration to ensure situations like these do not overburden the current system we have in place. We need to move forward, not backward. We want to know your thoughts on this issue, as we are just ending Tony's first month of being in office. == == == == == == == == == Your thoughts are crucial to Tony and the team, as we are still preparing his agenda for the year. == Thank you for your support, TX GOP Alerts (via Gonzales Campaign) Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress P.O. | Peter,
Breaking news: Liz Cheney - a Never Trump RINO - was reelected as the Republican Conference Chairwoman for the next two years.
I have been working tirelessly to turn the Republican Party into the "America-First" Party, but RINOs like Liz Cheney stand in the way of this movement. | Our movement depends on Patriots like you to stand up to the Establishment GOP and the rest of the Swamp, who only look to enrich themselves and serve their corporate donors.
I have traveled the country, even landing in Liz Cheney's home state of Wyoming, to fight for candidates who will put Americans first, defend Donald Trump's vision for our country, and take on the insider politics of D.C.
I have a huge target on my back for my stance against the Establishment, which is why I need every bit of support to continue this fight. Can you help out by making a quick donation?

body:
Did you miss Newt Gingrich's message below, Friend?

You've been someone we can rely on in the past which is why we were surprised to see you still haven't stepped up.

Schumer and the Democrats absolutely CRUSHED us when it came to fundraising last cycle and they have the donor base and infrastructure to do it again. That's why it's so critical that we get a head start to ensure our candidates have the resources to win! But we can't do that without your help.

[**Your chance to MAKE 4X IMPACT with your donation of ANY amount ends at midnight tonight, so I wanted to make sure you saw this before it was too late.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ipjjrMGqeWW-654kfKrlX8ccJAIFPtWlH0SUJoFvd7hSrCU9y5mxqy5nd2CJT3VIaAZ9ZaBdzs2bqRl8yU1Hzi9xn1SsP-fL7xgFaZONRTfGC4GdOpBfEiKTjglQosSvGqLjWTFPbxsF4-O1Eg-AHx6uJz1kwxiRgn1ll7RyyKxN2A1P4NIjvaPgJ_1UR-77ulsW2uEY9obaYm2uqS8gXQF5HBdCCMu4vzLsqk2vcO6bpxiAH7Ru4n092_shb7fSfRwd3WulhbBvbWEEerR0ln4mLvph6XialnDOluXlXQ9bEhMGL7k9hdkUem7xq2SBzDSGS1auUaJGmkM5zGM72vMMbMLSvfpFH7JrpQB1CvN1MGPBtB_Y-bmBUigItXspF1xXC3w2hsiytodsSDwoN9VXJjmx77TD30jqoAW1pgJtSo6DMnrUvz3hqH_-JB3&c=Bms_Agkr2nGt3Lf-J8bssgy0qcy7mC3ZcI2KIy6qJPMKFofSDvjyOA==&ch=CYdq0EkKKZrgZS8_qh7wCQI5w89gYdrXywvDJtTazbIWgJy43IkjJQ==)
[**CHIP IN NOW >> MAKE 4X IMPACT**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ipjjrMGqeWW-654kfKrlX8ccJAIFPtWlH0SUJoFvd7hSrCU9y5mxqy5nd2CJT3VIaAZ9ZaBdzs2bqRl8yU1Hzi9xn1SsP-fL7xgFaZONRTfGC4GdOpBfEiKTjglQosSvGqLjWTFPbxsF4-O1Eg-AHx6uJz1kwxiRgn1ll7RyyKxN2A1P4NIjvaPgJ_1UR-77ulsW2uEY9obaYm2uqS8gXQF5HBdCCMu4vzLsqk2vcO6bpxiAH7Ru4n092_shb7fSfRwd3WulhbBvbWEEerR0ln4mLvph6XialnDOluXlXQ9bEhMGL7k9hdkUem7xq2SBzDSGS1auUaJGmkM5zGM72vMMbMLSvfpFH7JrpQB1CvN1MGPBtB_Y-bmBUigItXspF1xXC3w2hsiytodsSDwoN9VXJjmx77TD30jqoAW1pgJtSo6DMnrUvz3hqH_-JB3&c=Bms_Agkr2nGt3Lf-J8bssgy0qcy7mC3ZcI2KIy6qJPMKFofSDvjyOA==&ch=CYdq0EkKKZrgZS8_qh7wCQI5w89gYdrXywvDJtTazbIWgJy43IkjJQ==)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Newt Gingrich
Date: [Wed, Feb 3, 2021](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ipjjrMGqeWW-654kfKrlX8ccJAIFPtWlH0SUJoFvd7hSrCU9y5mxqy5nd2CJT3VIaAZ9ZaBdzs2bqRl8yU1Hzi9xn1SsP-fL7xgFaZONRTfGC4GdOpBfEiKTjglQosSvGqLjWTFPbxsF4-O1Eg-AHx6uJz1kwxiRgn1ll7RyyKxN2A1P4NIjvaPgJ_1UR-77ulsW2uEY9obaYm2uqS8gXQF5HBdCCMu4vzLsqk2vcO6bpxiAH7Ru4n092_shb7fSfRwd3WulhbBvbWEEerR0ln4mLvph6XialnDOluXlXQ9bEhMGL7k9hdkUem7xq2SBzDSGS1auUaJGmkM5zGM72vMMbMLSvfpFH7JrpQB1CvN1MGPBtB_Y-bmBUigItXspF1xXC3w2hsiytodsSDwoN9VXJjmx77TD30jqoAW1pgJtSo6DMnrUvz3hqH_-JB3&c=Bms_Agkr2nGt3Lf-J8bssgy0qcy7mC3ZcI2KIy6qJPMKFofSDvjyOA==&ch=CYdq0EkKKZrgZS8_qh7wCQI5w89gYdrXywvDJtTazbIWgJy43IkjJQ==)
Subject: The march to the Majority

[**The march to win back the Senate Majority starts right now and it begins with YOU.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ipjjrMGqeWW-654kfKrlX8ccJAIFPtWlH0SUJoFvd7hSrCU9y5mxqy5nd2CJT3VIaAZ9ZaBdzs2bqRl8yU1Hzi9xn1SsP-fL7xgFaZONRTfGC4GdOpBfEiKTjglQosSvGqLjWTFPbxsF4-O1Eg-AHx6uJz1kwxiRgn1ll7RyyKxN2A1P4NIjvaPgJ_1UR-77ulsW2uEY9obaYm2uqS8gXQF5HBdCCMu4vzLsqk2vcO6bpxiAH7Ru4n092_shb7fSfRwd3WulhbBvbWEEerR0ln4mLvph6XialnDOluXlXQ9bEhMGL7k9hdkUem7xq2SBzDSGS1auUaJGmkM5zGM72vMMbMLSvfpFH7JrpQB1CvN1MGPBtB_Y-bmBUigItXspF1xXC3w2hsiytodsSDwoN9VXJjmx77TD30jqoAW1pgJtSo6DMnrUvz3hqH_-JB3&c=Bms_Agkr2nGt3Lf-J8bssgy0qcy7mC3ZcI2KIy6qJPMKFofSDvjyOA==&ch=CYdq0EkKKZrgZS8_qh7wCQI5w89gYdrXywvDJtTazbIWgJy43IkjJQ==)

If we don't start the fight to win back the Senate Majority right now, we will have absolutely no shot at securing victory and getting our country back on track. body:
You may have seen that earlier this week the Republican National Committee asked me to serve as general counsel for the organization... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470210?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Republicans United Against Far Left Democrats**_
You may have seen that earlier this week Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel asked me to serve as the general counsel of the RNC. It was an honor to be asked and I appreciate the executive committee of the RNC approving my appointment unanimously. I know the RNC looked to Indiana in large part due to the collective success we’ve had as a united party over the last several years. This new opportunity gives Indiana a front row seat in the fight to ensure free, secure and fair elections across the country. I’m looking forward to working with the rest of the RNC leadership team on those issues as well as ensuring we’re fully prepared for the 2022 election cycle. Speaking of...

The Biden Administration is off to a horrendous start and we as Republicans need to speak with unity and clarity against this extreme liberal agenda. We keep seeing the same thing over and over and over again from Biden, Pelosi, Schumer and the left. Less than a month into the total Democrat control in Washington, it’s clear the left’s calls of unity were merely lip service for MSNBC soundbites. The truth is, they’re running out the same leftwing playbook they trot out every single time. Increasing taxes, eliminating jobs, weakening our border, attacking energy independence, and so on. Needless to say, we’ve got our work cut out for us heading into 2022 and I know Indiana Republicans, working together, will do our party to wrestle back control.

Thank you,
Kyle
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ This week brought more positive developments on the fight against COVID-19. **Governor Holcomb** announced that vaccine eligibility has been expanded to now include Hoosiers 65 and over. **Governor Holcomb’s** leadership has Indiana consistently in the top tier of state vaccinations and broadening the eligibility will help us get through this faster. Visit [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=10ff1dd1dd&e=1acd9bb3d6) for more information. [\--> For more information about Indiana's vaccine rollout, click here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=efe12be46d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Governor Holcomb** also had a chance to visit with his friend, Medal of Honor recipient and 2018 Sachem Awardee Sammy Davis. Sammy’s story of service, courage and sacrifice for our nation and freedom is a true inspiration for all Americans. His heroic actions helped save the lives of his comrades in Vietnam. [\--> To learn more about Sammy's story, click here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=879398d3d0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=303a7b72c3&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d54b7116ba&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=86e9d7c6e2&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Indiana's Vaccine Rollout**_ Under **Governor Holcomb’s** leadership, Indiana's vaccine rollout is one of the best in the nation! In addition to healthcare workers and first responders, Hoosiers aged 65 and up are eligible for COVID-19 vaccinations. For more information about COVID-19 vaccinations in Indiana, visit [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=86e42e449e&e=1acd9bb3d6). [\--> For more information and to register, click here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1466071b51&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Black History Month**_ Monday marked the start of Black History Month –– an important opportunity for us to highlight the incredible achievements and contributions that African Americans have made to better our state and our nation.

Looking back at our Hoosier history books, it’s clear that Indiana would not be the state that it is today without the help of Black Hoosiers who pushed the boundaries, defied the odds, and paved the way forward in business, in sports, in music, and in so much more. Join us in celebrating them by watching this [video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8a6ea0a8e8&e=1acd9bb3d6).
[\--> Click here to watch our video celebrating Black History Month <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=94e03f03ae&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**Protecting Hoosier Consumers**_ **Attorney General Todd Rokita** is leading a multi-state, bi-partisan action to overturn a federal court decision and ensure state attorney generals can effectively fight robocalls. We're proud that **Attorney General Rokita** is at forefront of the fight against robocalls, which are excessively frustrating and can cause financial harm. _**“Hoosiers are sick and tired of being harassed by illegal and unwanted robocalls. Just as I promised when I ran for this office, we will stay on the offense in our efforts to protect Indiana consumers.” -Attorney General Todd Rokita**_
---
|
---
| _**Governor Holcomb's Statement on $12.5 Million Opioid Settlement**_ **Governor Holcomb** provided the following statement regarding the announcement of Indiana's $12.5 million settlement with McKinsey & Company, resolving investigations into the company’s role in profiting from the opioid epidemic:
**_“From the first day of my administration, I made combatting the drug epidemic a top priority, and that includes holding accountable those who created and fueled this crisis. I want to thank the Attorney General and his office for their work on this settlement that will help fund prevention, education and treatment efforts. No amount of money can undo the devastating toll inflicted by the opioid epidemic, but this is another step toward helping Hoosier families recover from this national crisis.” -Governor Holcomb_**
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[works to protect pregnant women in the workforce](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=26603d46c1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[unveils new Indiana dairy strategy](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc021d6003&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[announces proposal to rein in Biden's $1.9 trillion plan](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c073f17222&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[reintroduces constitutional amendment imposing Congressional term limits](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d2e18d843c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=91331f0954&e=1acd9bb3d6)[tands for the sanctity of human life](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fdbe799879&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[p](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ad8b04d516&e=1acd9bb3d6)[reviews GOP agenda](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=038755bf7a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird **[cosponsers legislation to restore Keystone Pipeline jobs](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0bcd5f7a69&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[selected to serve on 2 House committees](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4dfa3e56ad&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence **[honors fallen USCP officer Brian Sicknick](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ad312b79bb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[visits Terre Haute to talk about energy initiatives](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ce8e04689c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth **[thanks law enforcement](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a67d071598&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

No amount of money can undo the devastating toll inflicted by the opioid epidemic, but this is another step toward helping Hoosier families recover from this national crisis.” -Governor Holcomb | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019_te_2OCnc73GVEwuYGJvcZlg3Ko9jOjDkdBfbfv_FDyL19yHdlaqz3sgFv0eyF9L-P-k0kXgWhQ-5b-Y5V8dHDIBUlM6xRgNu3OGzSYe4KHCC0uuY38TO-0XCkMkRVeGzZqmrndfRU9axICU_Tlly7gB0_CQh2slmNEh6A1_nYvPggRbl5_Owk7afKE-OhIN2_L098WJQITvK-qsoJ-cfmHy-0pinWq5ls2yfz6LPj1N67mgQ6kmMLTpFfqkPmIICFaHnk3eLv4BdlTrX_REzthkss4P1q1FMfw00ef8rEUtB-o5v2ksMp5u5lHGh0KHjyJfPDy3FVn6RFuMMJETMMZGYalrZrZsWmloA_LbVpp2KHZcqEAM8EqhA9S9fPF1w9jI4do41evF4ppaovqDsBu0642ny9fgnAMwTVRBu59NgvMjOfT-VI8tFCZnv4S&c=nL3qEHMPHaHZrLNVZV3YQsJ9QJyG7vHlU7xC06XTJZPCac3lmD6upw==&ch=RCWU4ZHO29Mdj8br9oR3emzN02DZ9gZIqC418Mw0yJZXHEcupXuFJw==) Biden's far-left Administration is embracing open border strategies and creating loopholes that encourage illegal migration.

It's barely been two weeks Friend and President Biden has already made our country less secure and prioritized illegal immigrants over our own citizens.

Our country is in the midst of a pandemic, businesses are going under and families are struggling to put food on the table.

And yet, the Biden Administration has decided to put all that on the backburner.

**Instead, they 're focusing on blanket amnesty and the impeachment of a President who is no longer in office. The Democrats should be ashamed of themselves for what little they have done to help the American people so far.**

We can't allow this leadership to continue. The Democrats have made it clear TWO WEEKS into power that they have no interest in helping the American people. They simply want to use the power they have to acquire more and turn our country into the socialist utopia they've always dreamed of.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Roger=20Marshall?=
subject: A promise kept
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for Marshall
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=f82d4c39a7&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| | when I ran for the U.S. Senate, I promised Kansans I would never stop fighting for our way of life.

I said I would always be a strong voice for our farmers, ranchers, and landowners against ridiculous Washington overreach and unelected bureaucrats. To do that, we had to get a seat on the Agriculture Committee.

**And we’ve kept that promise — this week I was appointed to the Senate Agriculture Committee. **

As a fifth-generation Kansas farm kid, I couldn’t be prouder. It’s the honor of a lifetime to serve our state and nation. **And we’ve got a lot of work to do. **

**Joe Biden is already hammering agriculture and blue-collar jobs with a record number of executive orders. Senate Democrats are in lockstep with the radical left’s agenda. **

The American people are counting on a strong voice to stand up to their extremism and overreach — and you have my word, I will be that voice.

[**If you’re with me, then I hope you’ll help us hit the ground running by becoming one of our FIRST 2021 donors by clicking here.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=40d9631560&e=0b94e583bc)

We need to lay down an early marker that we are going to stand strong for our way of life against the radical left’s agenda to change Kansas and America as we know it.

[**I’m ready — how about you? **](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=497f17f352&e=0b94e583bc)

Thank you for standing with us.

Senator Roger Marshall
---
|
---
| [CHIP IN $10 »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=defb3a8659&e=0b94e583bc "CHIP IN $10 »")

| Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he do it without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=0799cdc67c&e=0b94e583bc&c=00d396b91f).

Peter,

_Have you seen this radical Democrat bill**H.R. 1** , or the “**For the People Act** ”?!_

**It’s called the “For the People Act,” but the only people it’s for are corrupt Democrat politicians & Socialists!**
* **It _nationalizes_ our elections and _removes_ power from the states!**
* **It _allows_ politicians to _profit_ off their own campaigns!**
* **It _silences_ Republican candidates and conservative voices. **
* **It _creates_ new Democrat states & _gives_ them permanent power in government! **

Peter, Democrats are finally in control and they are consolidating power as fast as they possibly can.

**There’s only one way we stop them...**

**We must start supporting freedom-loving Republican candidates RIGHT NOW and focus our efforts on winning back the House from Democrats in 2022! _[Peter , will you chip in $5, $10, or $25 to help Win Back the House in 2022 and Put a Stop to the Radical Left?](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=e1f516453a7547cabd63e7233aca5a62&_e=z0mKTHNR8y-93kpA8_9FF3RcsrsYtxjVfZSX10biPZ96MOOl0rvjVWZn46J8iXdgQS3GcmtAD3VNMS7uz6pKcUkPs0quJfxjXbjCv86mhBZO3P1KUhBK6QkM6fC-VZMtp3r8yEJb5qIL--L1buWFbMpKUe4v_QPwXd9cnCcpQoT0atLdMRK6vEGwZbiCEd6gy-Mvp5RbYMLxjOsjIpQX9mhby36j-Jt3oESKpRTpw-0aSFXgERBzSreIpi5UfKXyAc3wTkB8ZzXvteZv0vX7QJ4Q5k2OWwN9RzDyNWagt7tOSHes91SxFzFeWfNiidCcnV_2UYmpE9dvdkCSkoQIc68CDcG3rvX4XjsRWetelaQPIsX6Sip71M71SMSs7YNs1A52O63F5xiRZpFSP5BlUG0NYhOaxBWf0xZ1tyb4rcuAbGjM50iys6ro2CnMIZc_RNxEfjWLoD5htsWXzL0Hxp8fIKrcFwefNL6Oik_8RgU%3D)_**

**Peter****, I’m going to be blunt, the next couple of years will be rough** ; Nancy Pelosi and her Socialist allies will lead _**the Most Radical Congress in History!**_ It’s up to conservatives around the country to shut down their efforts, build highly engaged and well-funded grassroots movements, and help win close races in districts like mine!

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We're winning.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=3&akid=6467%2E53494%2EoDKGAZ) Friend, At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to contribute to Evergreen Action. But first, I want to explain why. In the last week, we've watched with excitement as the government took major steps toward a clean energy economy. In confirmation hearings for President Biden's Cabinet, nominee after nominee elevated climate and clean energy as issues of paramount importance. "One hundred and twenty-six thousand Michiganders were working in clean energy before COVID-19 hit," said Energy Secretary nominee and former Michigan Governor Jennifer Granholm. "This is a sector that every single state can benefit from. The products that reduce carbon emissions are going to create a $23 trillion global market by 2030. That is a massive opportunity." We couldn't agree more. Last Wednesday, President Biden temporarily stopped new oil and gas permits on public lands and ordered federal agencies to eliminate fossil fuel subsidies—two policy priorities we've been directly advocating for. And in the last week alone, we've released two substantive reports—one on ending fossil fuel subsidies and one that's a roadmap to 100% clean electricity by 2035—making waves on both Capitol Hill and in the press. **In other words, we're winning.** **[Our collective pressure is reverberating in public policy, and we can't take our foot off the gas now. Will you make a donation to Evergreen Action today to support our upcoming pressure campaigns on leaders across the country?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2062?t=4&akid=6467%2E53494%2EoDKGAZ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2063?t=5&akid=6467%2E53494%2EoDKGAZ)

Thank you,
Jamal Raad

Peter,

_I know you’re seeing what’s happening to America’s small businesses right now._ We’ve lost over **100,000** small businesses and the businesses that are left are fighting desperately just to stay open!

I come from generations of small business owners. **My parents’ business is literally on Main Street! **

And Peter, let me tell you — it makes me furious to see how Democrat lockdowns have decimated the people that are the backbone of our country.

I’m already fighting every day in Congress on the Small Business Committee to help defend our remaining small businesses, but I want to do more! That's why I’m putting together the _**MAIN STREET DEFENSE TEAM**_ , which will be made up of Americans who are tired of seeing the forced shutdowns of businesses in their communities!

**The Goal ➡️ Defend Small Businesses anyway we can! **
** **
**➡ _Fundraise_ for struggling small businesses!**
**➡ _Highlight_ draconian measures and fines on social media! **
**➡ _Hold_ Democrat politicians accountable for their hypocrisy! **

Peter, I’m reaching out to you directly, and because I know you’re one of those Americans who wants to join the fight for small businesses! _**[Add your name now to become a member of the Main Street Defense Team>>](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=d0ef57b1987747efb73cebefc91f7ca6&_e=bqTWxdp6ksC-KYn2sLsQh50bBXcUIptA5LVoVByEvdSysHpGBjAykOFqzGpbUvxljNDVqsqk5X0-WDM2igWKMYbm3dWjkUt-8hpEAQfdEvVd5lxUlUcajgCNgeuaWJf7-U5BZo0zG3g6hJmq2kzmCRZsvFXKPcwe-K1VhxFHS4DI5R4NX8Vdn0AX-WXSQ5jIHjv_d2vrTE3NCxrDuYuMgBKwYvv2u4xcdZNm5rx7QRizmJ6BE580rLR-ZKd4NrwgywGb7OFGaqRiReo15SWFM7ob0fC4heIOdae2yak7tH7gxFa58dx6M2mwDkQA2z0B8h7w0tuWRwW7rUzJUnoAlDAm_X6mt7FpbQeJwYn2hWjFQ7N-LkRAWKqBsFE_JoWUFe99c-CQewiHaw9vuFLhEwFAZ4N7JNGAG4NOROyl4d-YXLdImKk2_-pXqoIKAts_fI1VOPTVB4kNKESmDhAER6p0NImelEvz_Q0ujR6OrTUm4T3u90MZciwhxf2pwdwS)**_

name: Team NRSC
subject: If you love President Trump...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Term Limits Now 👶
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=55a80d4b9d5344a79eb29d5772158f0f&_e=vXNLSr7hahSGT2Axe8wYUGFYM6LF3c2bEpvRw3umQyjClSpTG7pI2YKVIlRm2RAscl-yypacZtbZ0K3vt_RAL9zhILEUjn8vodzy69svKHui4wzevsZClfX6CP9b9Ma1VI4ONWyZyIU5lJhmUF1Ds55_BLreL7tTglJJavjuV1K_VdEIZ2GBf8D7p04L75C6if1wl6zQK2ZZWSmI-IA-LtpmpeU99n58jvDUPyy0ZDoPKTfhWbqGrxTAhzRUIJeYU6JOCxvXDC4ardqe_LArDfMoPm_GAAbu6dYLIspg9to%3D) **Term Limits Now 👶
** **Politicians are like dirty diapers ... they need to be changed after a while or things really begin to stink.** That’s why I’m proud to cosponsor a [resolution](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=55a80d4b9d5344a79eb29d5772158f0f&_e=vXNLSr7hahSGT2Axe8wYUGo6T3y1MZXdD6_8ufljSLW__hnFoL8qqzEN4p5ePhT3OGhHY6dJ4WDzw8Eso3xVTPIkuSkNTxggt6TAEBQTqAUNWzvVW63E9y24r4B6tC7StOTBPFPVEbIK0Nu1K5VxjuEqCcAu7kBXUdS2gtwdwbJipmVW_V8nP8GRsvPCAmefARJKjBYY7pbjCYK0wk9mJ-gudBj5Q2fc0EO_L2EvaeesoFvoMDdqHJFLhoAC5xoNv77D_Pe7T5gnlafmmdIZRyXZPWL0uGChERNW3xu6aVILUhvNwDRU7crdggOrNLNlINq0sd6Aoc17X74yf4jl0qPIRAwvQMF0751SpDVa2Xgk58wKve6t_RBqLSe-miIN) this week that would impose term limits on members of Congress. Folks are often amazed at how little Congress gets done, and that’s because you have politicians who have been in Congress for 30 or 40 years who know they will keep getting reelected no matter what they do ... or don’t do!
That’s also why I introduced the “[Do Your Job Act](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=55a80d4b9d5344a79eb29d5772158f0f&_e=vXNLSr7hahSGT2Axe8wYUBHPZy8laB0QdTylnDm5j28pDdoJJx8jhAYSU8flgAyS0swI7WZFtnRDFdvaq8vVIaQLNJet8OHurEaXKo7IGc4dkf5MWhP_VgDhvAy82GP7YSSHTBdpJJb4nZgiwiiAsnw3MsdhLxyotyDVrBmnsEbh8CS_q1odAQ42cxyfXPC3X0ezjsJVmBlk8wtOKPrbqaWS_WM4tOMyQgf42JQk9Sra8aH9Els5aVIjQq3SRyCccH-gYDZ-S0iCL0UlpOzqQs3N0k6maBvksTppVxiG2mgIJw3XV4IQDOSiuynIwYbNdtzIj2LIK2CYMcMMaGBB1-xdj-we3ZA9jQeMlan8BOCUiTYQINt3Y3nx33ypyy_95ZmBPQXi9EW9RlmFkH07F_Rek2O3sZgZMP3pgldk9xAEszSz9H69JbYIjDzGkycYmUrhrDmoSAMwKOiR-JP_lFNA3JZa1jgOVyfRt83zBDc1c-PPOMZQuJ4QtxoSb_z4)” last Congress to reduce congressional members’ pay so long as they refuse to pass a budget. | |
---
**Jammin’ with Joe 🎶
**
**With February being Black History Month, it’s fitting to[celebrate WJBE](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=55a80d4b9d5344a79eb29d5772158f0f&_e=vXNLSr7hahSGT2Axe8wYUGFfXyqZ6du8YZCDPFpAKo1fXdVW5-21oVXOWrANtZQwY82qV1lBcA30GL1iwXHkaQFXPDx6tZCqGfJn8sYV3mfORQi2qt-tPHnnoCVULjK_1xfdgT3-Llpi-9K0CWpBlzxP-5GPiqvlYCDAz2ZMq_7ScseFt8Yc7DV08PBdb6_VOJsGrOMEfK_eUgBVKIDMCd7o254_xGAaix_P7mtHKJdI2BGeJ8UQYwLsn6_TJkdovHHNBcAEX04VSdCqB-4htA9cNKXCXa0PmL9opl-KzqdoxL_-Ztl1m1tG_uANJTofeaTJRqi0So6lbdGw7gPgANafqaFrOujCQUt0v1rEymjFzflGV0PQSUewJrl8cWTfjGCPfDhO8vZUxvMhVy1OKw%3D%3D), Knoxville’s only Black-owned radio station.** The station was started by James Brown, aka the Godfather of Soul, but disappeared in the seventies. Former State Rep. Joe Armstrong wanted to give people another outlet and revived the station in 2012.

I served with Joe in the state legislature, and he’s a good man. Joe has served his state and his community, dedicating himself to giving people access to new voices, new music, and new ideas. I’m more of a country western music man myself, but if you like rhythm and blues, then Joe’s your man.
|
---
**Just for Fun 💍
**

**Some folks may remember that I once[climbed into](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=55a80d4b9d5344a79eb29d5772158f0f&_e=vXNLSr7hahSGT2Axe8wYUJiArWnfYHnwQPkVQrLGnk4nuPSAyhxnVs0hVAuEaPPj0v-O70KYyqLyNw8wYH6IXS-4LBRUXVxU2a4bzkHdu2fNydo5sta58GbO99D9PXe5OxGzmj2F8RVWgsoJsDZAb6DF7N9oDnO2BVeAfpRrCf5mFv2opc-Xd2dz9dTFuMFw5aO7ystTUPxqylX3uQQANlbvnPJd-3LvHyn-_fvPVsoUQPOV2HDKFbNYD0Q99X5KwbrqoU6fTtCtSMBtid8m6fQvurVBkA2deLtYYreUI-WJrWEeueMZShcN5eDALZNJr5OWmRVXjbmVX0iMSAjJ67vGp7NhL-mmzVUIe0LRgmQ%3D) a storm drain to retrieve a man’s keys.** But now [this guy in New York City](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=55a80d4b9d5344a79eb29d5772158f0f&_e=vXNLSr7hahSGT2Axe8wYUKO4rYcFDqgxw-_tLqNZiOgImz0oRUDUJPyFipE_avNQlznwtN8Nl8j2qGJoQViSfypD1DD_8m0bUPuBVakF6TUoos4BeH8OMW4pFjJR9MhS6yRn7p-iypxVk2PtVUgz7i3JMOCidpNJ84afGNGp5ullFH8XAXvC8pcUgciWqrJ4A0Jg2mn-QIISQJIB2h4Ogx8sd-3HsYf0OxKqXS92pOcNtQdsT7X1_OijTLLP69oELUTs4uUm9qhnGncvuj_F6OnHkUmNChXpXC0DxxC5e0qzOYv1tOOoh7CB383STGENjpOertEfUV2PjpXuGxpITrzS3OweBQ9FZegqv18rivMr7N50PHipr-B41j9zxmSo) is trying to show me up! clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. Term Limits Now 👶 Politicians are like dirty diapers ... they need to be changed after a while or things really begin to stink. That’s why I’m proud to cosponsor a this week that would impose term limits on members of Congress. Folks are often amazed at how little Congress gets done, and that’s because you have politicians who have been in Congress for 30 or 40 years who know they will keep getting reelected no matter what they do ... or don’t do! That’s also why I introduced the “” last Congress to reduce congressional members’ pay so long as they refuse to pass a budget. | | Jammin’ with Joe 🎶 With February being Black History Month, it’s fitting to, Knoxville’s only Black-owned radio station. The station was started by James Brown, aka the Godfather of Soul, but disappeared in the seventies. Former State Rep. Joe Armstrong wanted to give people another outlet and revived the station in 2012. I served with Joe in the state legislature, and he’s a good man. Joe has served his state and his community, dedicating himself to giving people access to new voices, new music, and new ideas. I’m more of a country western music man myself, but if you like rhythm and blues, then Joe’s your man. | Just for Fun 💍 Some folks may remember that I once a storm drain to retrieve a man’s keys. But now is trying to show me up! Metropolitan Transportation Authority worker Shawn Fallon climbed into a sidewalk vent to find a woman’s heirloom ring which she had dropped. Kudos to Fallon for making a woman’s day. | Check out the Burchett Store 👕 Need some Team Burchett swag? We’re here to help. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Vaccination Clinics, Easing Business Restrictions, and the Super Bowl
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We're continuing to see our COVID-19 case numbers trend in the right direction, with hospitalizations steadily declining and percent positive at its lowest point in over three months. Thank you to Rhode Islanders for continuing to step up, wear masks, get tested, and protect your household. With over 2.5 million tests and over 100,000 vaccines in arms, we're on a good path. It's been a busy week, from Monday's snowstorm to Wednesday's State of the State address, and we're staying focused on keeping the virus under control, moving forward with vaccine distribution, and ensuring a smooth transition. Here's some news from this past week:
---
| | |
---|---
|
VACCINATION CLINICS

As [Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott announced yesterday](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L5LihokEEhUBfsY0xm6jIWP2d2dt1sH6Fcr9_e9pX0hVAh6WVnstFrizM0GbBXj6fraVpPN1KyWAhwKX-FkhAgiFJ6qg7wc5nQEekA8yxnXI_owAahYBwu5ZfN2cj6lkbjI2s-8zVmLg-46VTyaqBST2LpksA1uCcX6ZjPNScZOSs0toyQ4s_6Zl1CSC91or&c=EuaWOkIA2R9HNjRA-kLKBtXGG-CEfpoqTGgGf78PVXAf-VQfLoSOxw==&ch=JI8kWwEbiXm1nDjK1W2kZo8oZonYwWMPGHP-K-m3hJsSbenlZyGoOw==), there are going to be three main types of places where people will be able to get vaccinated:

* The first type of place is a state-run vaccination site. We expect these sites to open later this month, as more vaccine comes into Rhode Island. We eventually anticipate opening 5-10 of these sites across the state, with registration opening within the next couple weeks.
* The second location where vaccine will be available will be retail pharmacies. The same age, high-risk conditions, and geography framework will be used to determine who is eligible for an appointment. Learn about your eligibility [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L5LihokEEhUBfsY0xm6jIWP2d2dt1sH6Fcr9_e9pX0hVAh6WVnstFljrdSa3GyVZJ7eG0JXmshZHKibdTFOOCgqRQXRtspw23YrT3PniT2uQvCkOBanQVSsUVhCIYgEd8JxqF9EgPrJVXze7WpSqTXAQyQxswfNj&c=EuaWOkIA2R9HNjRA-kLKBtXGG-CEfpoqTGgGf78PVXAf-VQfLoSOxw==&ch=JI8kWwEbiXm1nDjK1W2kZo8oZonYwWMPGHP-K-m3hJsSbenlZyGoOw==).
* 14 different Walgreens locations will start administering shots next Tuesday. The registration process will open on Sunday morning. You can schedule by going to [walgreens.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L5LihokEEhUBfsY0xm6jIWP2d2dt1sH6Fcr9_e9pX0hVAh6WVnstFrizM0GbBXj6XKJ6jSs1fOCMPLqS_HqcyksMRJ-IPk2ODpjKYKqqQBeByrBm43azaLS_1KGe_DR_HewUbXpnuCY=&c=EuaWOkIA2R9HNjRA-kLKBtXGG-CEfpoqTGgGf78PVXAf-VQfLoSOxw==&ch=JI8kWwEbiXm1nDjK1W2kZo8oZonYwWMPGHP-K-m3hJsSbenlZyGoOw==) or calling Walgreens directly.
* CVS will start vaccinating in Providence and Johnston on Sunday. You can start scheduling on Saturday by going to [CVS.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L5LihokEEhUBfsY0xm6jIWP2d2dt1sH6Fcr9_e9pX0hVAh6WVnstFrizM0GbBXj6l2Z1i7zhwjrlTCQDFq201Pj-dRovYaorcIAO7F0hNqgZarjkBVnHQsmzMGmECiUe3jmLOZj00Yg=&c=EuaWOkIA2R9HNjRA-kLKBtXGG-CEfpoqTGgGf78PVXAf-VQfLoSOxw==&ch=JI8kWwEbiXm1nDjK1W2kZo8oZonYwWMPGHP-K-m3hJsSbenlZyGoOw==).
* The third type of place where people will be able to get vaccinated is local and regional vaccination sites. These will include community clinics run by cities and towns, like the pilot program that was run last week. It will also include vaccination happening through some hospital and healthcare systems, community health centers, and other sites in the community. Registration for these sites will be determined by municipalities.
* 7,000 doses total will be divided among cities and towns each week for four weeks, starting the week of February 14th. All cities and towns will then get second doses to vaccinate the people who received first doses. Scheduling will vary by city and town for these doses.

As I'm sure you've seen, vaccination slots are filling up as soon as they're announced, and so while it's difficult, you should be prepared for it to take some time before you can get your first shot. We're also working with home care agencies to ensure people unable to leave their homes are able to get vaccinated. Please be patient with our healthcare heroes working to get this vaccine out to everyone as fast as possible. Right now, we are only getting a little more than 16,000 first doses of vaccine each week, compared to the 80,000 people in Rhode Island who are 75 and older.
| | |
---|---
|
EASING BUSINESS RESTRICTIONS

With our numbers headed in the right direction, yesterday we announced a gradual loosening of some of our business restrictions:

* Capacity limits for catered events, including weddings, will increase to 30 people indoors and 50 people outdoors, provided that (1) there is pre-event testing of all event attendees, (2) a designated event COVID Safety Officer, and (3) restaurant rules are followed.
* For indoor dining, capacity limits will remain at 50%, but up to two households will be allowed per table up to a maximum of 8 people per table. For outdoor dining, up to three households will be allowed per table capped at 8 people per table.
* For offices, capacity limits will increase to 33% and remote workers may return to the office. However, remote work is still encouraged, if feasible and practical.
* For gyms, sports facilities, and indoor recreation, capacity limits will increase to 1 person per 125 sq. ft. and spacing requirements will be reduced to 6 ft.

| | |
---|---
|
SUPER BOWL

We're all excited for the big game, but please remember that social gatherings are still limited to your immediate household. Don't gather or have big parties! The end of this pandemic is in sight, and we can't throw that progress away. We'll all be able to gather soon, and before you know it, we'll be watching the start of the 2021 season together.
| -Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=a054aa0c-aa6f-4861-bf83-9f8d9cc2f5a2)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
